all.en: This plan defines the preventive maintenance schedule for production line three.
all.zh: 本計畫定義第三條產線的預防性保養排程。

all.en: The objective is to maintain equipment availability above ninety six percent.
all.zh: 目標係維持設備可用率高於百分之九十六。

all.en: Daily checks are performed by the operating crew at the start of each shift.
all.zh: 每班開始時由作業組進行日常檢點。

all.en: Visual inspections cover guards, sensors, and emergency stop buttons.
all.zh: 目視檢查涵蓋護蓋、感測器與緊急停止按鈕。

all.en: Lubrication tasks are scheduled weekly during the planned downtime window.
all.zh: 潤滑作業每週於計畫停機時段執行。

all.en: Filters and screens are cleaned every two weeks regardless of condition.
all.zh: 濾網與篩網無論狀態如何均每兩週清潔一次。

all.en: Monthly tasks include belt tension checks and alignment verification.
all.zh: 月度作業包含皮帶張力檢查與對位確認。

all.en: Vibration analysis on critical motors is conducted every quarter.
all.zh: 關鍵馬達的振動分析每季執行一次。

all.en: Thermal imaging surveys are performed on electrical panels twice a year.
all.zh: 電控盤的熱影像檢測每年執行兩次。

all.en: Major overhauls are planned during the annual factory shutdown in August.
all.zh: 大修排定於八月年度工廠停產期間進行。

all.en: Spare parts inventory is reviewed monthly to maintain optimal levels.
all.zh: 備品庫存每月檢討以維持最適水位。

all.en: Critical spares are stocked locally to minimize repair lead times.
all.zh: 關鍵備品於本地備存以縮短維修前置時間。

all.en: All maintenance work is logged in our computerized maintenance management system.
all.zh: 所有保養工作均登錄於電腦化保養管理系統。

all.en: Work orders must include start time, end time, and parts consumed.
all.zh: 工單須包含開始時間、結束時間與耗用零件。

all.en: Technicians are required to record root causes for every breakdown event.
all.zh: 技師對每起故障事件均須記錄根本原因。

all.en: Mean time between failures is tracked as a key performance indicator.
all.zh: 平均故障間隔時間列為關鍵績效指標進行追蹤。

all.en: Mean time to repair targets are set at under two hours for major faults.
all.zh: 重大故障的平均修復時間目標設定為兩小時以內。

all.en: Training plans ensure each technician is certified on at least three machines.
all.zh: 訓練計畫確保每位技師至少獲得三台機械的認證。

all.en: Safety lockout and tagout procedures must be followed without exception.
all.zh: 安全上鎖與掛牌程序須無例外遵循。

all.en: Contractors performing specialized work must present valid insurance documentation.
all.zh: 執行專業作業的承包商須出示有效保險文件。

all.en: Maintenance budget for this year totals two point three million dollars.
all.zh: 本年度保養預算總計兩百三十萬美元。

all.en: Approximately sixty percent is allocated to preventive activities.
all.zh: 約百分之六十的預算配置於預防性活動。

all.en: The remaining forty percent covers reactive and improvement projects.
all.zh: 其餘百分之四十涵蓋反應性與改善型專案。

all.en: Monthly performance reviews are held with the production leadership team.
all.zh: 每月與生產領導團隊舉行績效檢討會議。

all.en: This plan will be revised should production volumes change significantly.
all.zh: 若生產量出現顯著變動，本計畫將予以修訂。

all.en: Predictive analytics tools are being piloted to anticipate component failures earlier.
all.zh: 預測分析工具正試行導入，以更早預測零件故障。

all.en: Sensor data from the line feeds directly into the analytics dashboard.
all.zh: 產線感測器資料直接傳入分析儀表板。

all.en: Anomalies trigger automatic alerts to the on call maintenance engineer.
all.zh: 異常情況會自動觸發警示通知待命維修工程師。

all.en: Knowledge articles are updated whenever a new failure mode is identified.
all.zh: 每次發現新故障模式時，知識文件即予更新。

all.en: Cross functional reviews ensure both quality and engineering inputs are captured.
all.zh: 跨職能檢討會議確保品質與工程的意見均納入考量。

all.en: Tooling changes are coordinated through the daily production planning meeting.
all.zh: 治具變更透過每日生產規劃會議協調安排。

all.en: Safety stand downs are convened immediately after any serious near miss.
all.zh: 發生任何重大近未遂事件後將立即召開安全停工會議。

all.en: Continuous training credits are awarded to technicians who complete advanced modules.
all.zh: 完成進階模組的技師可獲得持續訓練學分。

all.en: Plans for next year include automating routine lubrication on twelve more assets.
all.zh: 明年計畫包括將另外十二項設備的例行潤滑作業自動化。

all.en: Together these efforts protect throughput, quality, and the wellbeing of operators.
all.zh: 上述努力共同守護產出、品質與作業員的安康。

all.en: Reliability engineering principles guide the prioritization of every maintenance task.
all.zh: 可靠性工程原則指引每項保養任務的優先排序。

all.en: Failure mode and effects analysis is updated whenever new equipment is commissioned.
all.zh: 每當新設備上線時即更新失效模式與效應分析。

all.en: Condition monitoring sensors detect issues before they cause unplanned downtime.
all.zh: 狀況監測感測器可在問題引發非計畫停機前先行偵測。

all.en: Oil sample analysis is performed quarterly for hydraulic and gearbox systems.
all.zh: 液壓與齒輪箱系統每季進行油品取樣分析。

all.en: Refurbishment of legacy assets is evaluated against full replacement cost benefits.
all.zh: 老舊資產的整新與全面汰換的成本效益併同評估。

all.en: Maintenance metrics dashboards are visible on monitors throughout the plant floor.
all.zh: 保養指標儀表板於廠區各處顯示器上即時呈現。

all.en: After action reviews follow every breakdown that exceeds the recovery time target.
all.zh: 凡修復時間超過目標的故障，事後皆進行事件檢討。

all.en: Spare parts vendors are consolidated to reduce administrative overhead each year.
all.zh: 備品供應商每年進行整併以降低行政負擔。

all.en: Cross plant benchmarking helps surface best practices for adoption locally.
all.zh: 跨廠標竿比較有助發掘可在地化採行的最佳實務。

all.en: Annual reliability awards recognize the technicians who deliver outstanding uptime.
all.zh: 年度可靠性獎肯定締造傑出運轉時數的技師。

all.en: I always grab a flashlight from my locker before starting any inspection inside the gearbox cabinet.
all.zh: 我每次要檢查齒輪箱櫃前，都會先從置物櫃拿手電筒。

all.en: Honestly, those new condition monitoring sensors saved us from a midnight call out last Saturday.
all.zh: 老實說那些新的狀況監測感測器，讓我們上週六半夜免於被叫回廠。

all.en: My mentor told me to never trust a clean machine that just stopped without an alarm trigger.
all.zh: 我的師傅說過，沒觸發警報就突然停機的乾淨機台絕對不能信。

all.en: Don't skip wiping down the sensors during weekly cleaning, even if they still look fine to the eye.
all.zh: 每週清潔時別跳過擦拭感測器，就算外觀看起來還很乾淨。

all.en: The maintenance crew brought homemade dumplings to celebrate hitting our annual uptime target.
all.zh: 達成年度運轉時數目標時，保養組同事帶了自己包的水餃來慶祝。

all.en: I label every spare part bin with my own sticker system, since the original tags fade really quickly.
all.zh: 我自己用一套貼紙系統標記每個備品盒，因為原本的標籤褪色超快。

all.en: Honestly, the August shutdown is busy but it's also when I learn the most from senior technicians.
all.zh: 老實說八月停產很忙，但也是我從資深技師身上學到最多東西的時候。

all.en: If your gut tells you a bearing sounds wrong, log a work order even before the vibration alarm fires.
all.zh: 如果你直覺軸承聲音怪怪的，就算振動警報還沒響也先開張工單。

all.en: I keep a printed copy of the lockout procedure in my back pocket whenever I'm on a new piece of kit.
all.zh: 每次接觸新設備時，我都會在後口袋放一份印出來的上鎖程序。

all.en: After eight years on the same line, I can usually tell something is wrong just by the smell of the lubricant.
all.zh: 在同一條線上待了八年，我聞潤滑油的味道大概就能判斷哪裡不對勁。
